sections.paragraph:
ἀντιπαρέλκω (παρέλκω ‘draw aside’) only pass. let oneself be dragged over to the opposite side 2 Cl 17:3.—DELG s.v. ἕλκω.

pass. pass. = passive (either of grammatical form or of passive experience); also used in reference to literary portion=passage

2 Cl 2 Cl = 2 Clement—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 90
